query:
-- Atualizar a unidade existente (Studio Barra7 = Orthanc principal)
UPDATE units SET
  name = 'Studio Barra7',
  slug = 'studio-barra7',
  isActive = 1,
  orthanc_base_url = 'http://172.16.3.241:8042',
  pacs_ip = '172.16.3.241',
  pacs_port = 8042,
  pacs_ae_title = 'ORTHANC'
WHERE id = 60004;

-- Inserir Orthanc 2 (porta 4007 → 172.16.3.243)
INSERT IGNORE INTO units (name, slug, isActive, orthanc_base_url, pacs_ip, pacs_port, pacs_ae_title, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Unidade 2', 'unidade-2', 1, 'http://172.16.3.243:4007', '172.16.3.243', 4007, 'ORTHANC2', NOW(), NOW());

-- Inserir Orthanc 3 (porta 4006 → 172.16.3.242)
INSERT IGNORE INTO units (name, slug, isActive, orthanc_base_url, pacs_ip, pacs_port, pacs_ae_title, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Unidade 3', 'unidade-3', 1, 'http://172.16.3.242:4006', '172.16.3.242', 4006, 'ORTHANC3', NOW(), NOW());

-- Inserir Orthanc 4 (porta 4008 → 172.16.3.244)
INSERT IGNORE INTO units (name, slug, isActive, orthanc_base_url, pacs_ip, pacs_port, pacs_ae_title, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Unidade 4', 'unidade-4', 1, 'http://172.16.3.244:4008', '172.16.3.244', 4008, 'ORTHANC4', NOW(), NOW());

-- Inserir Orthanc 5 (porta 4009 → 172.16.3.245)
INSERT IGNORE INTO units (name, slug, isActive, orthanc_base_url, pacs_ip, pacs_port, pacs_ae_title, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Unidade 5', 'unidade-5', 1, 'http://172.16.3.245:4009', '172.16.3.245', 4009, 'ORTHANC5', NOW(), NOW());

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT id, name, slug, orthanc_base_url, pacs_ip, pacs_port FROM units ORDER BY id;
